key_drivers: Real yields falling (DFII10 at 1.82%, declining trend) - primary bullish driver for gold, tech, and equities
USD weakening (DXY at 98.86, down from 102+) - broad tailwind for commodities, FX, and risk assets
Risk-off spike (VIX surged to 29.49, +24% on March 6) - supporting safe havens (gold, JPY) while creating headwinds for equities and AUD
